title: spilanthes acmella var. paniculata
intro: Spilanthes acmella var. paniculata, also known as toothache plant, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Spilanthes acmella var. paniculata include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and fight against infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat toothaches, mouth ulcers, and other oral health issues.
